title: rubus planus
intro: Rubus planus, also known as the wild or dewberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus planus include its rich content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus planus include improving cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus planus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations.
